scripts.test:balance: node --test tests/genetics-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-lab.test.mjs && node tools/groupthink-sim.mjs
scripts.test:balance:smoke: node --test tests/genetics-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-lab.test.mjs && node tools/groupthink-sim.mjs --smoke --gate-only
scripts.test:shared: node --test tests/genetics-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-lab.test.mjs && playwright test tests/groupthink.spec.js tests/groupthink-online.spec.js tests/groupthink-scale.spec.js tests/groupthink-isolation.spec.js tests/ui.spec.js tests/online.spec.js --project=desktop
scripts.test:exhaustive: node --test tests/genetics-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-lab.test.mjs && GT_EXHAUSTIVE=1 playwright test --workers=2
scripts.test:gates:apply: node --test tests/genetics-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-rules.test.mjs tests/groupthink-lab.test.mjs && GT_EXHAUSTIVE=1 playwright test --workers=2 && GT_LAYOUT_VALIDATED=1 node tools/groupthink-sim.mjs && node tools/apply-groupthink-decision.mjs --confirm=APPLY_GATED_RULES && playwright test tests/groupthink.spec.js tests/groupthink-online.spec.js tests/groupthink-scale.spec.js tests/groupthink-isolation.spec.js tests/ui.spec.js tests/online.spec.js --project=desktop && GT_EXHAUSTIVE=1 playwright test --workers=2
